title: Funny Roulette
description: Every time you break a block there is a chance of one in a million that you blow up. Each time you don't blow up the chance will increase by one
body:
# BOOM!

Every time you break a block there is a chance of one in a million that you blow up. Each time you don't blow up the chance will increase by one.

## Requirements
[FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Preview
